pages.text: $(italic)Bio-Factory$() is the bridge between $(bold)Create$() and $(bold)Biomancy$(). It lets Create machinery produce and handle biomancy's fluids and materials — automating parts of the flesh-craft with belts, basins, and pumps.$(br2)For the biomancy side of that pairing, see the $(italic)Wetware Appendix$() — Novus's dedicated Biomancy guide.
pages.title: Bio-Factory
